{{Quote|Relax, we'll get those air factories working again and free the prisoners. Trust me.|[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]|<ref name="GB" />}}
The '''Liberation of Kessel''' was a battle conducted in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. A [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Army/Legends|army]] landed on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] to re-power the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] factories and rescue the [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]].

==Prelude==
{{Quote|Before evacuating the planet, the Imperial Governor of Kessel ordered the air processing factories to be shut down, leaving the prisoners without any air to breathe. Since the Rebel fleet wouldn't be able to get there in time, Han, Chewie, Luke, and I sped off to Kessel in the Falcon.|Lando Calrissian|<ref name="GB" />}}
After the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] lost the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], it was decided to abandon [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. The [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] factories were shut off, although the [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] were forced to continue working the [[Glitterstim/Legends|Glitterstim]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Mining/Legends|mines]]. The [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], shortly after [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|liberating]] their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], heard of the situation and sent a [[Army/Legends|strike force]] to reactivate the atmosphere factories.

==The battle==
{{Quote|Hey kid, if we don't get those air processors back on-line, there won't be any prisoners left to save.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="GB" />}}
[[File:GB_liberation_of_kessel.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The Wookiee base]]
Generals [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and and a force of Wookiees: 6 workers, 8 Repeater [[Bowcaster/Legends|Bowcaster]] troopers, 4 [[Berserker|Advanced Berserkers]], 4 [[Missile Trooper (Wookiee)|Missile Troopers]], 2 [[Proton Torpedo Launcher (Wookiee)|Heavy Torpedo Launchers]], 1 [[Kettrifee Air Mover]], and 8 [[Agr (starfighter)|Advanced Agrs]]. The strike force established a base, consisting of a [[Barracks/Legends|troop center]], a [[Command center]], a [[Fortress/Legends|Fortress]], and a [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]] on a cliff north of the Imperial's [[Detention Center A]], [[Detention Center B]], and [[Detention Center C]]. The Wookiee forces endured attacks from the Imperial military bases which sent [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]], but with additional units, the Wookiees were able to construct [[Power core/Legends|power cores]] and reactivate the four nearby atmosphere factories.

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|The Kessel mission was an overwhelming success.|Lando Calrissian|<ref name="GB" />}}
The Imperials lost control of Kessel, and the slaves were freed after the battle.

==Behind the scenes==
The Liberation of Kessel was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] for the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. It appeared during the Chewbacca campaign's bonus mission. The player was tasked with re-powering the atmosphere generators, and may build any sized army to do so. Players could attack or ignore the Imperial bases; the strategy guide recommends the player just concentrate on building the power cores.
